This comprehensive course will equip you with the skills needed to work with real-world datasets, apply machine learning algorithms, and deploy AI solutions . By the end of the course, you’ll have a solid foundation in AI, a portfolio of end-to-end projects, and confidence to tackle complex challenges in data science and AI .

No prerequisites are required for this course . The curriculum covers everything from the basics of Python programming, statistics, and machine learning to advanced topics in deep learning, NLP, and generative AI . Explore Generative AI & Vector Databases: Learn the concepts and applications of generative models, vector databases, and retrieval-augmented generation . Build Real-World Projects: Implement end-to-end machine learning and AI projects .

Ultimate Data Science & GenAI Bootcamp teaches Python syntax and building a foundation for learning advanced concepts . This module takes your Python skills further by diving into object-oriented programming concepts like classes, inheritance, and polymorphism .

In this module, you will master the core aspects of data manipulation using Pandas . The module covers critical tasks like handling missing data, reindexing, and applying statistical functions to datasets . You’ll also gain hands-on experience with data visualization and advanced indexing techniques .

In this module, you’ll learn how to visualize data effectively using Python's popular libraries, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly . Mastering NumPy will teach you how to leverage NumPy for machine learning and deep learning applications .

module dives into advanced SQL techniques, including complex queries, joins, and indexing for efficient data retrieval . Module covers key database design concepts like primary and foreign keys and normalization . By the end, you’ll be proficient in managing large-scale databases .

This module provides a foundation in statistics and probability, covering essential terms, concepts, and methods . You’ll learn about different types of data, levels of measurement, and key statistical measures like mean, median, variance, and standard deviation . The module introduces random variables, probability distributions, and various types of probability functions .

Explore advanced concepts like P-values, T-tests, and Chi-square tests . By the end, you’ll be equipped to conduct sophisticated statistical analysis and make informed decisions based on data-driven evidence .

In this module, you’ll learn how to perform Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to uncover patterns, trends, and relationships in your data . This module provides a comprehensive introduction to machine learning, covering key algorithms and techniques .

In this module, you’ll explore the basics of Natural Language Processing (NLP) for machine learning applications . Topics include text preprocessing (stemming, lemmatization), tokenization, and POS tagging . You'll also learn how to implement key NLP techniques like Named Entity Recognition and word embeddings .

This module introduces you to the architecture and workings of artificial neural networks (ANNs) The module also covers backpropagation and the vanishing gradient problem . By the end, you’ll be equipped to build and train basic neural networks and understand how deep learning models are used in AI applications .

In this module, you’ll dive into Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), a cornerstone of deep learning in computer vision . The module covers practical applications like image classification, object detection, and segmentation using CNNs . By the end, you'll have hands-on experience building and training CNNs for real-world vision tasks .

This module covers Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) and Transformer models . You’ll learn how RNNs and LSTMs are used for time series analysis, speech recognition, and language modeling . The module also explores the Transformer architecture, which powers models like BERT and GPT .

In this module, you’ll explore the world of Generative AI, understanding how these models generate new data based on patterns learned from existing data . The module also covers advancements in generative models, including GANs and VAEs . This module introduces you to the concept of vector databases .

This module introduces the concept of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), which combines retrieval-based search with generative models for enhanced language generation tasks . Explores popular vector databases like Faiss, Pinecone, and ChromaDB . You’ll be equipped to work with vector databases for handling complex data queries .
